message:
test(mpsc,merge,router): expand test coverage for edge cases

mpsc: add tests for cancelled reserve/recv, send-after-receiver-drop,
try_reserve when waiters are queued, and permit-drop unblocking.

merge: fix test compilation by boxing heterogeneous stream types into
trait objects so PendingEveryOther and UnknownUpper can coexist in
the same merge call.

router: add route-priority tests verifying literal-before-param and
literal-before-wildcard ordering, nested routers, trailing-slash
normalization, and multi-method dispatch on overlapping paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
